name: web-design-automation-factory
description: Autonomous luxury web design engine for 3 high-value niches (medical, legal, home-services). 6-stage pipeline: brand bible extraction, competitor matrix, niche-aware production build, polish, critique, and delivery with monthly tech-stack upkeep.

scripts.build: npm run generate && npm run build:css
scripts.pipeline: npm run extract && npm run analyze && npm run build && npm run polish && npm run critique
scripts.lint: node -e "const {html, css} = require('./js/exporter'); if(!html||!css){process.exit(1);} require('./js/exporter').Exporter.compileWorkspace({}); console.log('lint OK: exporter + config loadable');" && node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('config/niches.json'));console.log('niches.json OK')"

author: Techart484
